name: Tassha, the Snowfur Wolf (from the hit game Rabbit & Steel)
description:
the jokes genuinely just write themselves with that name.

this doesn't exactly have any spoilers, so... cool, i think?

i think she's sorta russian.

go play Rabbit & Steel if you uhhh like bullet hells and stuff.

(i swear the bot is good...)

i believe the artist is mino_dev (because it's in the game's art gallery)
creator: superkuzia15
